2026-02-04T15:31:33.4590397Z     set(nlohmann-json_IMPLICIT_CONVERSIONS OFF)
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4590572Z

2026-02-04T15:31:33.4856994Z pybind11 provides CMake targets. There are two modes provided; classic, which is built on the old Python
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4857365Z discovery packages in CMake, or the new FindPython mode, which uses FindPython
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4857662Z from 3.12+ forward (3.15+ _highly_ recommended).
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4857842Z 
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4858114Z New FindPython mode:
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4858268Z 
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4858552Z     find_package(Python COMPONENTS Interpreter Development)
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4858848Z     find_package(pybind11 CONFIG)
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4859015Z 
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4859279Z     # pybind11 method:
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4859567Z     pybind11_add_module(MyModule1 src1.cpp)
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4859734Z 
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4859960Z     # Python method:
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4860250Z     Python_add_library(MyModule2 src2.cpp)
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4860557Z     target_link_libraries(MyModule2 pybind11::headers)
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4860870Z     set_target_properties(MyModule2 PROPERTIES
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4861155Z         INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION ON
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4861443Z         CXX_VISIBILITY_PRESET ON
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4861747Z         VISIBILITY_INLINES_HIDDEN ON
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4862034Z     )
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4862176Z 
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4862452Z For more information see here:
2026-02-04T15:31:33.4862751Z     https://pybind11.readthedocs.io/en/latest/compiling.html#building-with-cmake
